articles.summary: Most payment platforms make you choose: flexibility and innovation or scale and reliability.

articles.title: BRAND… A PRODUCT JOB NOW?
articles.summary: Brand is no longer defined by marketing. It's built through the product experience. As AI reshapes search and competition intensifies, teams must design products that evoke emotion, reflect taste, and create memorable moments, because in the end, marketing can attract attention, but only the product earns love.

articles.title: THE ART OF ASKING BETTER QUESTIONS
articles.summary: Great questions come from curiosity and empathy. Ask openly, listen deeply, and create safety to turn conversations into trust, insight, and meaningful connection.

articles.title: UNDERSTANDING ENABLING CONSTRAINTS USING SHAPE UP (BASECAMP)
articles.summary: Effective constraints drive focus, creativity, and learning when thoughtfully designed, contextually applied, and culturally supported. Success depends on intent, alignment, and disciplined yet adaptive use over time.

articles.title: THE COMPOUNDING STARTUP
articles.summary: Only 3.5% of SaaS startups reach $20M ARR. The winners do so by reinventing themselves, turning small, steady improvements in pricing, retention, and revenue mix into compounding growth.

articles.title: HOW CAN PROJECT AND PRODUCT MANAGERS DELIVER MORE VALUE? 1,400 PRACTITIONERS AND 37 EXPERTS WEIGH IN
articles.summary: When product and project managers work in sync, teams deliver faster and create lasting value. This new report from Project Management Institute [10] breaks down the shared skill sets and practices that make collaboration work, backed by global research and expert insights

HOW TO BUILD A MOBILE APP AS A PRODUCT PERSON (STOP PROMPTING, START PLANNING)
articles.summary: Shipping a real app revealed that success depends on planning, not features. Treat AI tools as strategic partners, build with feature flags, and focus on learning, iteration, and disciplined execution.

articles.title: 3 PROVEN METHODS TO GET THE MOST OUT OF CHATGPT-5
articles.summary: ChatGPT-5 delivers better results when prompts are precise and structured. Use keyword cues like “think deeply” to trigger advanced reasoning, control verbosity with clear length instructions, and format prompts in XML for clarity and consistency.

articles.title: WHERE YOU BUILD IS WHO YOU ARE: THE ELEVENLABS STORY
articles.summary: ElevenLabs shows how geography, culture, and intent can shape an AI company's edge. It scaled without losing authenticity or agility by balancing research with product pragmatism, creative collaboration, and global perspective.

articles.title: SEVEN YEARS AFTER THE EXIT - 10 THINGS I WISH I HAD KNOWN
articles.summary: After his exit, Medoma founder Johan Nordenström learned that success means little without purpose. His reflections reveal that true wealth lies in time, freedom, and the people you share them with.

articles.title: QUICK WINS ARE THE TIP OF THE ICEBERG
articles.summary: “Quick wins” often hide deep complexity, turning simple tasks into costly detours.

articles.title: ANSWERING NEXT YEAR'S REVENUE GROWTH QUESTION…
articles.summary: Framing growth as a shared responsibility turns pressure into collaboration across the entire company.
